scripts.build: astro build && node scripts/add-sitemap-lastmod.mjs && pagefind --site dist
scripts.deploy: npm run build && aws s3 sync dist/ s3://azoneai.ru --endpoint-url=https://storage.yandexcloud.net --profile yc --delete
scripts.deploy:only: aws s3 sync dist/ s3://azoneai.ru --endpoint-url=https://storage.yandexcloud.net --profile yc --delete
